page.title: Template:Occupation by nationality and century category header

revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Occupation by nationality and century category header]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

{{Category other |{{Occupation by nationality and century category header/outercore|diagnose={{{diagnose}}}|sort_key_pn ={{sort_key_pn| }}|JobPortal={{{JobPortal}}}|Occupation={{{Occupation}}}|ParentOccupation={{{ParentOccupation}}}|SiblingOccupation={{{SiblingOccupation}}}|Title_century={{{Title_century|{{{Title century|{{Title century}}}}}}}}|Title demonym={{{Title_demonym|{{{Title demonym|{{Title demonym}}}}}}}}|Title_demonym={{{Title_demonym|{{{Title demonym|{{Title demonym}}}}}}}}|Title_continental={{{Title_continental|{{Country2continental|{{{Title_country|{{GetCountryNameFromAdjective|{{{Title_demonym|{{Title demonym}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|Title_country={{{Title_country|{{GetCountryNameFromAdjective|{{{Title_demonym|{{Title demonym}}}}}}}}}}|nondiffdenom_noun={{{nondiffdenom_noun|people}}}|nondiff={{{nondiff|}}}|women_variant={{{women_variant|women}}}|lgbt_variant={{{lgbt_variant|LGBTQ}}}|male_variant={{{male_variant|male}}}}}|{{Error|This page is not in the [[Wikipedia:Namespace|category namespace]].
This template is for use only on category pages.}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]}}{{Automatic category TOC|numerals=no}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing programmatically generated pages
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Occupation by nationality and century category header]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: Mass importing wikipedia categories, not taking histories because these are unused ones and it is kind of obvious where they came from
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Occupation by nationality and century category header]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Occupation by nationality and century category header]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]]

revision.comment: Removed redirect to [[en:Template:Occupation by nationality and century category header]]
revision.text:

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Category other |{{Occupation by nationality and century category header/outercore|diagnose={{{diagnose}}}|sort_key_pn ={{sort_key_pn| }}|JobPortal={{{JobPortal}}}|Occupation={{{Occupation}}}|ParentOccupation={{{ParentOccupation}}}|SiblingOccupation={{{SiblingOccupation}}}|Title_century={{{Title_century|{{{Title century|{{Title century}}}}}}}}|Title demonym={{{Title_demonym|{{{Title demonym|{{Title demonym}}}}}}}}|Title_demonym={{{Title_demonym|{{{Title demonym|{{Title demonym}}}}}}}}|Title_continental={{{Title_continental|{{Country2continental|{{{Title_country|{{GetCountryNameFromAdjective|{{{Title_demonym|{{Title demonym}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|Title_country={{{Title_country|{{GetCountryNameFromAdjective|{{{Title_demonym|{{Title demonym}}}}}}}}}}|nondiffdenom_noun={{{nondiffdenom_noun|people}}}|nondiff={{{nondiff|}}}|women_variant={{{women_variant|women}}}|lgbt_variant={{{lgbt_variant|LGBTQ}}}|male_variant={{{male_variant|male}}}}}|{{Error|This page is not in the [[Wikipedia:Namespace|category namespace]].

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Category other |{{Occupation by nationality and century category header/outercore|diagnose={{{diagnose}}}|sort_key_pn ={{sort_key_pn| }}|JobPortal={{{JobPortal}}}|Occupation={{{Occupation}}}|ParentOccupation={{{ParentOccupation}}}|SiblingOccupation={{{SiblingOccupation}}}|Title_century={{{Title_century|{{{Title century|{{Title century}}}}}}}}|Title demonym={{{Title_demonym|{{{Title demonym|{{Title demonym}}}}}}}}|Title_demonym={{{Title_demonym|{{{Title demonym|{{Title demonym}}}}}}}}|Title_continental={{{Title_continental|{{Country2continental|{{{Title_country|{{GetCountryNameFromAdjective|{{{Title_demonym|{{Title demonym}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}|Title_country={{{Title_country|{{GetCountryNameFromAdjective|{{{Title_demonym|{{Title demonym}}}}}}}}}}|nondiffdenom_noun={{{nondiffdenom_noun|people}}}|nondiff={{{nondiff|}}}|women_variant={{{women_variant|women}}}|lgbt_variant={{{lgbt_variant|LGBTQ}}}|male_variant={{{male_variant|male}}}}}|{{Error|This page is not in the [[Wikipedia:Namespace|category namespace]].

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23520214635|time triggered pipeline]]
